title: E-cloth Bathroom Cleaning - 2 cloths
features: The E-Cloth Bathroom Cleaning Kit packs the one-two punch your cleaning routine is missing. With one specialized microfiber cloth for cleaning and another for polishing, all you need to add is water for spotless, shining ceramic, tile, glass, and chrome
Dampen the E-Cloth Bathroom Cloth and wipe to remove soap scum, grime, scale, and over 99% of bacteria. Follow with the Glass & Polishing Cloth for sparkling, streak-free, chrome and glass

Masses of precision-engineered microfibers unlock water's cleaning power. No need for messy pastes, powders, single-use wipes, or sprays that could leave behind worrisome films and linger in the air you breathe
We think our 1-year or 100-wash promise stacks up nicely against the mountain of paper towels and additional cleaning products you might use otherwise
No more hiding the bathroom behind closed doors. With a powerful E-Cloth Bathroom Cleaning Kit plus water, you're swipes away from a clean you'll want to show off
